disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absolute inability to pass any urine voluntarily for approximately 14 hours
trigger_question_examples: When did you last pass urine?
Are you able to pass any urine at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I last went yesterday morning, about 14 hours ago, and since then nothing will come out no matter how hard I try.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, constant, bursting lower-central abdominal (suprapubic) pain with a relentless urge to void
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and what is it like?
Do you still feel the urge to go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's an unbearable bursting pain low down in the middle of my belly and I feel a desperate urge to go the whole time, but I just can't.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Self-described tense, distended, tender lower abdomen swelling toward the umbilicus
trigger_question_examples: Does your lower belly feel full or swollen?
Can you feel or see any swelling low down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my lower belly is swollen and hard and it's bulging up almost to my belly button, and it's sore to press.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Overflow dribbling — small amounts of urine leaking involuntarily in the last hour without any relief
trigger_question_examples: Is any urine leaking out on its own?
Has even a little bit come out without you meaning it to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Just a few drops have been dribbling out on their own in the last hour, but it hasn't relieved the pressure at all and I still can't actually go.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six-month history of progressive obstructive urinary symptoms — hesitancy, weak stream, nocturia — never a complete blockage before today
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any trouble with your urine stream over recent months?
Do you get up at night to pass urine, or is your stream slow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about 6 months my stream's been weak and slow to start and I've been up several times a night, but I've never been completely blocked until today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Started an over-the-counter cold and sinus preparation containing a decongestant two days before the blockage
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medicines, including anything from the chemist?
Are you taking anything for a cold or blocked nose?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I bought a cold and sinus tablet from the chemist a couple of days ago for a blocked nose — I've been taking it since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, shaking chills or flank/back pain reported at this point (pertinent negatives screened)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any fever, shakes or chills?
Any pain in your back or sides?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no fever or shakes, and no pain in my back — it's all low down in the front of my belly.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think so, but honestly the belly pain is all I can focus on right now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient lives alone with no one available to assist or transport him
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you?
Would you be able to get to a hospital if you needed to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own and there's nobody here to help me.
